Sionachie's Partisan  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
CHA: +6 INT: +2
SV MAGIC: +5
WT: 1.8 Size: MEDIUM
Class: BRD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

▲ Page top
Luck was on my side
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2002 at 6:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252759405
76 posts
I got lucky yesterday and got my first group in KC with my 47 Bard. Within 15 minutes in CY1 we pulled the Caller of Sathir and I won the roll on Sionaches Partisan. Having to roll for a bard only weapon when I was the only bard in the group seemed a bit lame, but I won anyway with a roll of 26 :) Ohhhhhh the luck! I wish I would have been practicing pierce all these levels... Time to spend some of those practice points.

TheGMan Mystanote
48 Bard - Quellious
▲ Page top
Pricing and Rarity
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 11:50 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591773916956
View User Forum
Sage
164 posts
This is listed as common, but I beg to differ. I have spent a lot of time hunting the callers in Karnor's and this has never dropped.

I saw it selling in the market for 1000pp the other day on Mithaniel Marr. In general, a bard-only weapon with these stats (no proc) would not go for that much if it were common.

It's a fast weapon with a long range, so I use it in conjunction with the Symphonic Sabre so I don't steal aggro.
▲ Page top
could not pass it up!
QuoteReply
# May 27 2002 at 9:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254569871
2 posts
While in EC tunnel selling some things, I notices somone selling a GBS for 450pp. Well of course I bought it and proceeded to try to trade it for another weapon. After about 2 hrs. I got a tell that someone wanted to give me the partisan for the GBS.



Draab
20 Bard
Bristlebane

Put this baby in my primary melee. Wow. Celerity running(Song, 36). It deffinately restored my faith in the bard melee capabilities.(Not as good as warriors, but for a psuedo tank piercing for 35 is pretty good I think)

Hello:)

Good luck!
